tipRules.tip: KVD: 'Power fishing the spawn: use a squarebill to locate stumps, then make persistent casts from various angles. Slow the retrieve to keep bait banging on cover for erratic deflection. Several big fish came after 4+ casts to the same stump. If snagged, snap free from a distance or break off — never go over the stump and disturb the area.'

knowledge.insight: KVD: 'Don't assume you must finesse spawning bass. At the 2011 Classic, 4 of top 7 finishers power fished spinnerbaits and crankbaits on the same 150-yard spawning flat. Key conditions: hard bottom flat with stumps + grass, 10-degree water temp rise in a week, full moon. Day 1 spinnerbait (fish aggressive), Day 2 crankbait (fish on beds, needed triggering). Dirty water helped crankbait effectiveness.'
